# ChainStream

> The multi-chain Web3 data service — one API, one GraphQL endpoint,
> one WebSocket stream and one Kafka cluster for every token, trade,
> wallet, pool, and compliance signal across Solana, Ethereum, BSC,
> Base, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Avalanche, zkSync, Sui and more.

## Data Products
- [Data Products Overview](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/data-products/overview): Catalog of every dataset ChainStream publishes
- [Tokens](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/data-products/tokens): Metadata, prices, market data, security signals
- [Trades](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/data-products/trades): Normalized DEX swaps across chains
- [Wallets](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/data-products/wallets): Balances, PnL, net worth, activity
- [DEX Pools](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/data-products/dex-pools): Pool state, reserves, TVL, fee tiers
- [Candles (OHLC)](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/data-products/candles-ohlc): Multi-interval OHLC bars
- [Holders](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/data-products/holders): Top holders and distribution
- [Smart Money](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/data-products/smart-money): Curated high-performing wallet cohorts
- [Rankings](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/data-products/rankings): Hot/new/migrated token lists
- [Blockchain Core](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/data-products/blockchain-core): Raw blocks, transactions, logs, gas
- [Data Freshness & SLA](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/data-products/data-freshness): Latency expectations per product

## Access Methods
- [Access Methods Overview](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/access-methods/overview): REST vs GraphQL vs WebSocket vs Kafka vs SDK vs CLI vs MCP
- [REST API](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/access-methods/rest-api): Lookup and snapshot endpoints
- [GraphQL](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/access-methods/graphql): Flexible analytical queries
- [WebSocket](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/access-methods/websocket): Real-time subscription channels
- [Kafka Streams](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/access-methods/kafka-streams/overview): Low-latency server-side consumption
- [SDKs](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/access-methods/sdks): TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust client libraries
- [CLI](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/access-methods/cli): Shell-native `chainstream` command

## AI Agents (consumer surface)
- [AI Agents Overview](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/ai-agents/overview): How agents consume ChainStream
- [MCP Server](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/ai-agents/mcp-server/introduction): Model Context Protocol endpoint for Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT
- [Agent Skills](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/ai-agents/agent-skills/introduction): Installable SKILL.md packages — install via `npx skills add chainstream-io/skills -a <agent>`
- [chainstream-data Skill](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/ai-agents/agent-skills/chainstream-data): Read-only on-chain data (token/market/wallet)
- [chainstream-graphql Skill](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/ai-agents/agent-skills/chainstream-graphql): Custom GraphQL analytics over 27 cubes
- [chainstream-defi Skill](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/ai-agents/agent-skills/chainstream-defi): DeFi execution — swap, launchpad, broadcast

## Compliance
- [Compliance Overview](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/compliance/overview): KYT + KYA inside the same API
- [KYT](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/compliance/kyt-concepts): Know-Your-Transaction risk scoring
- [KYA](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/compliance/kya-concepts): Know-Your-Address profiling

## Supported Chains
- Solana, Ethereum, BSC, Base, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Avalanche, zkSync, Sui — plus more
- DEXes: Uniswap v2/v3/v4, Raydium, Meteora, PancakeSwap, Aerodrome, Jupiter, and others

## Platform
- [Authentication](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/platform/authentication/api-keys-oauth): API keys, OAuth, wallet-auth
- [x402 Payments](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/platform/billing-payments/x402-payments): HTTP-native USDC micropayments for agents
- [MPP Payments](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/platform/billing-payments/mpp-payments): Tempo stablecoins + Stripe superset of x402
- [Rate Limits](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/platform/billing-payments/plans-and-units): Per-plan throughput

## Getting Started
- [Home](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/home): Documentation landing page
- [Quickstart](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/docs/quickstart): First authenticated call in 5 minutes
- [API Reference](https://docs.chainstream.io/en/api-reference/overview): Every programmatic surface
